summary: Tested dark mode contrast fix for Overview card balance on Dashboard. The CSS fix in App.css successfully maintains WHITE background for .overview-card and DARK text (#212121) for .balance-large in dark mode, ensuring high contrast readability.
passed_tests: Overview card maintains WHITE background (rgb(255,255,255)) in dark mode
Balance large text uses DARK color (#212121 / rgb(33,33,33)) in dark mode
Balance small 'Available balance' label uses readable gray (#757575 / rgb(117,117,117)) in dark mode
Overview label 'OVERVIEW' uses readable gray (#757575) in dark mode
Balance visibility toggle (eye icon) works correctly in dark mode
Light mode balance display unchanged (no regression) - dark text on white card
Theme toggle button switches between light and dark mode correctly
Page background changes to dark (gray-900) in dark mode while overview card stays white

fix_verification.bug_description: In dark mode, the big balance amount (e.g., €30.216,00) was becoming extremely light/grey and looked almost hidden while the card background stayed white
fix_verification.visual_verification: Screenshots confirm overview card stays white in dark mode with clearly visible dark balance text

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All dark mode contrast tests passed

test_credentials.note: Test user (test_dark_mode_c7f35065@test.com) was created and cleaned up after testing

seed_data_creation: Created temporary test user with KYC and account for UI testing, cleaned up after test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode contrast fix for Overview card balance has been verified. The CSS rules in App.css correctly apply: (1) white background to .dark .overview-card, (2) dark text #212121 to balance-large, (3) readable gray #757575 to labels. All tests pass for both dark and light modes with no regressions.
